# Eternal Feather

## Observed Text

- For every 5 cards in your Deck, heal 3 HP whenever you enter a Rest Site.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Stronger in larger decks and on paths with immediate rest sites; can convert low-HP post-elite wins into enough recovery to smith or survive the boss approach.
